author: opus
text:
review/close: accept --as for identity override

Mirrors prime/claim/update so review and close are no longer the only
identity-attributing commands that require BALLS_IDENTITY. Drop is
unchanged because it has no attribution surface today (no note, no
worker field on the resulting commit).

From the lernie postmortem (2026-04-22): an agent had to consult the
skill guide to remember the env-var form because review didn't accept
--as. Small papercut, ~3 lines per command to fix.
